# LinkedIn — About

```
Building at the intersection of AI, cultural technology, and women's health — and founder of ArchCanvas + ArchLang, an AI architect for floor plans built on an open-source compiler I wrote.

I architect AI agents that survive production and build the platforms around them — for founders who need speed, teams who need depth, and users who aren't the Silicon Valley default.
```

## 🏗️ Founder — ArchCanvas + ArchLang

```
My current flagship build — sole author, every commit mine, building in public. ArchLang is an open-source declarative language that COMPILES a floor plan written as .arch source into dimensioned SVG/DXF/PDF — "Typst/LaTeX for architecture" (github.com/ChanMeng666/archlang · playground.archlang.uk · npm @chanmeng666/archlang). ArchCanvas is the AI architect built on it: a plain-English brief becomes one strong, checkable floor plan — parametric, not pixels — that you refine by talking to it (archcanvas.uk).
```

## 🤖 AI Agent Engineering

```
Agentic systems end-to-end: retrieval (RAG, pgVector), memory, tool use, evaluations, model routing across Claude/OpenAI/Llama. Earliest-ecosystem MCP server author (Google News MCP — PulseMCP Top Pick). FemTracker Agent merged into CopilotKit (36.1k★).
```

## 💻 Full-Stack Foundations

```
Next.js, TypeScript, Drizzle/Postgres, Stripe, Kubernetes. Shipped voice-first interfaces, bilingual UX, and zero-downtime cloud migrations. GAVIGO IRE — p50 < 1 ms activation, validated by Google for Startups + NVIDIA Inception.
```

## 🌿 Cultural-First Technology

Tam-AI-Ti — an AI Financial Wellness Coach for Māori communities — encodes Te Whare Tapa Whā as a first-class domain model, not UI decoration: 351 solo commits, voice-first te reo Māori + English.
